title: orthochilus eustachyus
intro: Orthochilus eustachyus, also known as Eustachys orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Orthochilus eustachyus include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by boiling the roots in water to create a tea that is consumed for its medicinal properties.
